mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ADMIN_USERS WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT ar.role_code FROM ADMIN_USER_ROLES aur INNER JOIN ADMIN_ROLES ar ON aur.role_id = ar.role_id WHERE aur.admin_id = #{adminId} AND aur.deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE ADMIN_USERS SET login_fail_count = login_fail_count + 1 WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
mapper.select: SELECT login_fail_count FROM ADMIN_USERS WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ADMIN_USERS SET login_fail_count = 0, locked_until = NULL WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
UPDATE ADMIN_USERS SET locked_until = #{lockedUntil} WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
UPDATE ADMIN_USERS SET last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt} WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
UPDATE USERS SET locked_until = NULL, login_fail_count = 0, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
UPDATE USERS SET status_code = #{statusCode}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AUDIT_LOGS ( actor_type_code, actor_id, action_type_code, target_type_code, target_id, description, ip_address, created_at ) VALUES ( #{actorType}, #{actorId}, #{actionType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )

INSERT INTO LOGIN_HISTORIES ( history_id, user_type_code, user_id, login_result_code, fail_reason, ip_address, device_info, user_agent, login_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_LOGIN_HISTORIES.NEXTVAL, #{userTypeCode}, #{userId}, #{loginResultCode}, #{failReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deviceInfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAgent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )
mapper.select: SELECT login_at, login_result_code, ip_address FROM LOGIN_HISTORIES WHERE user_type_code = 'USER' AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY login_at DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT terms_id, agreed_yn, agreed_at FROM USER_TERMS_AGREEMENTS WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY agreed_at DESC
SELECT ca.card_id, c.card_name, ca.application_status, ca.applied_at FROM CARD_APPLICATIONS ca INNER JOIN CARDS c ON ca.card_id = c.card_id WHERE ca.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ca.applied_at DESC

SELECT au.name AS admin_name, lh.login_at, lh.ip_address FROM LOGIN_HISTORIES lh INNER JOIN ADMIN_USERS au ON lh.user_id = au.admin_id WHERE lh.user_type_code = 'ADMIN' AND lh.login_result_code = 'SUCCESS' ORDER BY lh.login_at DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM CARDS WHERE status_code = #{cardStatus}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE status_code = #{statusCode} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM USERS WHERE TRUNC(created_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TERMS WHERE status = #{status}
